mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stress_data ( sensor_id, force_value, displacement_value, collect_time, verify_status, create_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{sensorId}, #{forceValue}, #{displacementValue}, #{collectTime}, 0, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, sensor_id AS sensorId, force_value AS forceValue, displacement_value AS displacementValue, calc_stress AS calcStress, verified_stress AS verifiedStress, verify_status AS verifyStatus, verify_remark AS verifyRemark, collect_time AS collectTime, calc_time AS calcTime, verify_time AS verifyTime, create_time AS createTime, deleted FROM stress_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND collect_time = #{collectTime} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE stress_data SET calc_stress = #{calcStress}, calc_time = #{calcTime}, verify_status = 1 WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND collect_time = #{collectTime} AND deleted = 0 AND verify_status IN (0, 3)

UPDATE stress_data SET verified_stress = #{verifiedStress}, verify_time = #{verifyTime}, verify_remark = NULL, verify_status = 2 WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND collect_time = #{collectTime} AND deleted = 0 AND verify_status = 1

UPDATE stress_data SET verify_remark = #{verifyRemark}, verify_time = #{verifyTime}, verify_status = 3 WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND collect_time = #{collectTime} AND deleted = 0 AND verify_status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT sensor_id AS sensorId, force_value AS forceValue, displacement_value AS displacementValue, calc_stress AS calcStress, verified_stress AS verifiedStress, verify_status AS verifyStatus, verify_remark AS verifyRemark, collect_time AS collectTime, calc_time AS calcTime, verify_time AS verifyTime FROM stress_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND deleted = 0 AND verify_status = 2 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sensor_id AS sensorId, force_value AS forceValue, displacement_value AS displacementValue, collect_time AS collectTime FROM stress_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
